fields.name: lineNo
fields.label: Line No.
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_InventoryLine WHERE M_Inventory_ID=@M_Inventory_ID@

fields.name: storageBin
fields.label: Storage Bin
fields.defaultValue: @SQL=SELECT M_LOCATOR_ID AS DEFAULTVALUE FROM M_LOCATOR WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@, M_LOCATOR.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> -1 AND ISACTIVE='Y' AND M_WAREHOUSE_ID=@M_WAREHOUSE_ID@  ORDER BY M_LOCATOR.ISDEFAULT DESC

derivation.source: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(Line),0)+10 AS DefaultValue FROM M_InventoryLine WHERE M_Inventory_ID=@M_Inventory_ID@

SELECT M_LOCATOR_ID AS DEFAULTVALUE FROM M_LOCATOR WHERE AD_ISORGINCLUDED(@AD_Org_ID@, M_LOCATOR.AD_Org_ID, @#AD_Client_ID@) <> -1 AND ISACTIVE='Y' AND M_WAREHOUSE_ID=@M_WAREHOUSE_ID@  ORDER BY M_LOCATOR.ISDEFAULT DESC
